mapper.select: SELECT * FROM matches WHERE match_time > NOW() ORDER BY match_time LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM matches ORDER BY sale_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO matches (name, home_team, away_team, home_logo, away_logo, match_time, sale_time, venue_id, venue_name, poster, status, min_price, max_price, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{homeTeam}, #{awayTeam}, #{homeLogo}, #{awayLogo}, #{matchTime}, #{saleTime}, #{venueId}, #{venueName}, #{poster}, #{status}, #{minPrice}, #{maxPrice}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE matches SET name = #{name}, home_team = #{homeTeam}, away_team = #{awayTeam}, home_logo = #{homeLogo}, away_logo = #{awayLogo}, match_time = #{matchTime}, sale_time = #{saleTime}, venue_id = #{venueId}, venue_name = #{venueName}, poster = #{poster}, status = #{status}, min_price = #{minPrice}, max_price = #{maxPrice}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
